name: garak — LLM red-team import
description: Imports a garak (github.com/NVIDIA/garak, the LLM vulnerability scanner) report into the XORCISM LLM red-team / AI-BAS module. Parses report.jsonl (newline-delimited JSON) or a summary JSON, normalizes each probe's outcome to the OWASP LLM Top 10 (prompt injection, sensitive-info disclosure, insecure output, misinformation, ...), and produces the result list ingested by POST /api/ai-redteam/import/<aiSystemId>. Complements the offline guardrail-coverage assessment at /ai-redteam with ground-truth attack outcomes against a registered AI system. Offline: pass `file`, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A garak report.jsonl or summary JSON to parse
